n: A Drink of the Best Character

steps.t: The Plough and Stars is in Brockenborings in the Shire. You should speak with Halson Tubwort in Brockenborings, who sells mead, which shall be brought…
Nathalan is in Aughaire, a town of Angmar. You should deliver the Swill -- actually mead -- to Nathalan.
